svg.title: Witness Manipulation Attack — CAT+CSFS Sighash Preimage Tampering Impossibility
svg.desc: Animated diagram showing three independent witness-tampering attacks (prefix, suffix, hash type) on CAT+CSFS sighash preimage assembly and CSFS verification. All three attacks fail: any modification to the witness causes the reassembled preimage to diverge from the real sighash, triggering CHECKSIGVERIFY rejection.
svg.text: Witness Manipulation Attack — CAT+CSFS Sighash Impossibility
